mapper.sql: binding_id, channel_id, sales_id, effective_from, effective_to, bind_source, bind_remark, operator_id, create_time, update_by, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO jst_sales_channel_binding ( binding_id, channel_id, sales_id, effective_from, effective_to, bind_source, bind_remark, operator_id, create_time ) VALUES ( #{bindingId}, #{channelId}, #{salesId}, #{effectiveFrom}, #{effectiveTo}, #{bindSource}, #{bindRemark}, #{operatorId}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT FROM jst_sales_channel_binding WHERE channel_id = #{channelId} AND effective_to IS NULL LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE jst_sales_channel_binding SET effective_to = #{closeAt}, update_time = NOW() WHERE binding_id = #{bindingId} AND effective_to IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT FROM jst_sales_channel_binding WHERE sales_id = #{salesId} AND effective_to IS NULL
SELECT FROM jst_sales_channel_binding WHERE effective_to IS NULL ORDER BY effective_from DESC LIMIT #{limit}
